message:
🌱 Add countdown timer to update progress banner

Shows estimated seconds remaining during updates (~60s countdown).
Displays "Almost done..." when the countdown reaches zero.
Uses tabular-nums for non-jumpy number rendering.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -520,6 +520,8 @@
       "updating": "Updating...",
       "startingUpdate": "Starting update — please wait...",
       "doNotNavigate": "Please do not navigate away while the update is in progress.",
+      "estimatedRemaining": "~{{seconds}}s remaining",
+      "almostDone": "Almost done...",
       "updateComplete": "Update complete — restart successful",
       "updateFailed": "Update failed",
       "devMode": "Dev Mode",
